# Copilot Instructions for jonchongch.github.io

## Project Overview
- This is a personal portfolio website hosted at jonchongch.github.io
- All development work starts from dev/worktrees/ before merging to master
- The .github folder and its contents must NEVER be overwritten by any push or merge

## Worktree & Branch Naming Rules
- All new development worktrees must be created under: dev/worktrees/
- Worktree naming must follow this format: copilot-worktree-yyyy-mm-dd
- Example: copilot-worktree-2026-06-24
- Never start new dev work outside of the worktrees folder

## Protected Files
- The .github/ folder is protected and must never be overwritten
- Never delete or modify .github/copilot-instructions.md during merges or pushes
- If a merge conflict occurs in .github/, always keep the existing version

## Code Style
- Always write well commented code
- Add a comment above every section, function, and block of CSS
- Comments should explain WHY, not just what the code does
- Keep code readable and beginner-friendly

## HTML Rules
- Always include alt text on images
- Use semantic HTML tags (header, main, section, footer, nav)
- Every page must have a proper meta description and title tag

## CSS Rules
- Use CSS variables for all colors and fonts at the top of the file
- Use HEX color codes for all colors
- Write mobile-first CSS
- Use flexbox as the default layout method

## Portfolio Specific
- Pages are for personal portfolio content
- Keep the design clean, minimal and professional
- New pages should match the style and structure of existing pages
